cookie.heading: Cookies on VegasHunter
cookie.message: We use cookies to understand how visitors use VegasHunter and to improve our editorial coverage. You can accept all, decline non-essential, or open settings.
error_404.body: The page you were looking for could not be located.
error_404.heading: Page not found
footer.age_warning: 18+ — gambling can be addictive. Play responsibly. Never bet more than you can afford to lose.
footer.disclosure: VegasHunter is reader-supported. We may earn a commission when you sign up at a casino through links on this site. This never affects our editorial scoring or ranking — every verdict is the product of independent observation, never paid placement.
meta.tagline: Online casinos, hunted and reviewed since 2026.
page.about.heading: About VegasHunter
page.about.lead: VegasHunter is an editorial directory of online casinos. Every score is the product of patient observation, never paid placement.
page.contact.body: For editorial inquiries, partnership requests, or feedback, write to us at {email}.
page.contact.heading: Contact
page.methodology.heading: How we score casinos
page.methodology.lead: Our scoring method, the categories we measure, the weights we apply, and the things we refuse to measure.
page.privacy.body_placeholder: Our full privacy policy will be published before the site goes live. Until then, we collect no personal data on this site beyond standard server logs.
page.privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
page.responsible_gambling.heading: Responsible Gambling
page.responsible_gambling.lead: Gambling can be addictive. Set limits. Take breaks. If you need help, the helplines below are available 24/7.
page.terms.body_placeholder: Our full terms of service will be published before the site goes live.
page.terms.heading: Terms of Service
ranking.empty: No casinos match this ranking yet. Check back soon.
region_blocked.body: VegasHunter is not currently available in your country. We are sorry for the inconvenience. If you believe this is a mistake, please contact us.
region_blocked.heading: Service not available in your region
rg.helplines: Helplines: BeGambleAware (UK) · GamCare · Gamblers Anonymous · GambLine (CA)
rg.statement: Gambling involves risk. If gambling is no longer fun, take a break.
